name: CREATE_AGENT: jani last skill ham jo cr

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: jani last skill ham jo cr" initialized.

result.reply:
Haan, main samajh rahi hoon ki tum kisi specific skill ke baare mein pooch rahe ho. Lekin, system mein mere paas *context* nahi hai ki humne *last* kya create kiya tha. 😅

Kya tum mujhe thoda hint de sakti ho? Jaise ki:

1.  **Us skill ka goal kya tha?** (Woh kya kaam karti thi?)
2.  **Us skill se related kaun se tools use ho rahe the?**
3.  **Kya woh skill coding se related thi, ya social media se?**

Agar tum mujhe bas ek keyword ya ek line bhi bata dogi, toh main turant usko *recall* karke, tumhare liye detailed explanation de dungi. Okay? 😊
